articles.title: 'War Lockdown' Notice Goes Viral; Turns Out To Be An April Fool's Prank
articles.description: What made the notice so convincing was its presentation. It carried a formal layout and an Ashok Chakra-style emblem, giving it the appearance of an urgent public advisory.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Vince Lombardi: ‘The price of success is hard work, dedication to the job at hand…’
articles.description: Vince Lombardi's powerful words remind us what is truly important. He breaks success down into its core components, highlighting how hard work and dedication are crucial to any task a person has taken on.

articles.title: Avoiding an AI nightmare: Why India needs its own regulatory path
articles.description: AI’s impact will unfold gradually, but rapid advances demand proactive governance. Global models vary from flexible to strict. India should adopt an agile, risk-based approach—balancing innovation, safety, and inclusion—without over-regulation that could hinder startups and growth.

articles.title: LSG vs DC Live Score, IPL 2026: Can a revitalised Rishabh Pant find his magic once again?

articles.title: CBSE History paper QR code links to Orry; internet reacts, 'Question paper maker is quite Gen Z'
articles.description: The QR code on the History paper, which was held on March 30, 2026, takes users to Orry’s image when scanned. The unusual inclusion quickly gained traction online after the popular content creator also shared a video.

articles.title: Mumbai judge falls victim to cyber fraud while trying to ger his phone repaired, loses  ₹93,000
articles.description: In Mumbai, a judge was scammed out of  ₹93,000 after a fraudulent call from someone impersonating Samsung customer service. After installing an APK file, he unknowingly authorized two transactions. Cybercrime cases in India have surged, with significant financial losses reported.

articles.title: How regulation is rewiring the deal-making rule book in India
articles.description: India's deal-making landscape thrived in 2025, with notable increases in deal values and counts. Regulatory adjustments, especially concerning foreign investments and commercial borrowing, are set to bolster confidence and streamline processes across various key sectors.

articles.title: Mass robotaxi malfunction halts traffic in Chinese city
articles.description: Baidu has not responded to a request for comment about the outage, which affected at least 100 cars.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to walk away from Iran war and pull U.S. out of NATO
dailyNews.description: Trump says he expects the U.S. war with Iran to end within several weeks despite unrelenting attacks from both sides and Iran's iron grip on the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump indicates he'll try to pull U.S. out of NATO
dailyNews.description: President Trump has told Britain's Telegraph newspaper he could try to terminate U.S. membership in NATO. He's railed against NATO allies for refusing to join the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court to hear arguments in birthright citizenship case today
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court will convene for arguments Wednesday to consider the legality of President Trump's executive order that seeks to end birthright citizenship.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran war could wrap up in 2-3 weeks as gas prices rise
dailyNews.description: President Trump indicated the Iran war may wrap up "very soon" and he could abandon efforts to force Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, as the war pushed U.S. gas prices over the $4 mark.

dailyNews.title: Trump to give "important update on Iran" tonight in prime-time speech
dailyNews.description: President Trump is planning to deliver a prime-time address Wednesday night to "provide an important update on Iran," the White House said, as the president faces critical decisions in the monthlong war.

dailyNews.title: Trump plans to attend Supreme Court arguments in birthright citizenship case
dailyNews.description: President Trump is planning to go to the Supreme Court on Wednesday as the justices take up his executive order seeking to end birthright citizenship, a major test of his immigration agenda.

dailyNews.title: Judge orders Trump admin. to restore legal status of migrants allowed in under Biden
dailyNews.description: A federal judge directed the Trump administration to restore the legal status of migrants allowed into the U.S. under a now-defunct Biden administration program for asylum-seekers who arrived at the southern border.
